CustomField.formula: AND( ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, 'EHS'), !ISPICKVAL(Type_devis__c, 'CRC'), ISPICKVAL(Objet_de_la_demande__c, 'Devis'), ISBLANK(TEXT(Statut_de_la_conversion__c)), TECH_RecordTypeDeveloperName__c = 'Appel_Sortant', OR( ISPICKVAL(Type_equipement_souhaite__c, 'Chaudière gaz murale'), ISPICKVAL(Type_equipement_souhaite__c, 'Climatisation'), ISPICKVAL(Type_equipement_souhaite__c, 'Pompe à chaleur') ), OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee__c, 'SEA'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'GADS'), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'MSADS') ), OR( ISBLANK(Nom_operation_commerciale__c), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Nom_operation_commerciale__c)), NOT(BEGINS(Nom_operation_commerciale__c, 'SEAMarque'))) ) ), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee__c, 'SEO'), AND( ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee__c, 'Partenaire'), OR(ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'ReworldMedia'), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'Kwanko'), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'HabitatPresto'), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'Compleo'), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'Batiweb'), ISPICKVAL(Origine_detaillee_2__c, 'DevisPlus') ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: TECH_ToBeTransferedToAD
